products.title: JEANS 1.6
products.body_html:
INTRODUCING OUR PREMIUM JEANS—A PERFECT COMBINATION OF STYLE, COMFORT, AND QUALITY. CRAFTED WITH CARE, THESE JEANS FEATURE SUPERIOR DENIM FABRIC, EXQUISITE EMBROIDERY, AND A RELAXED BAGGY FIT. ELEVATE YOUR WARDROBE WITH OUR STANDOUT JEANS THAT OFFER DURABILITY, STUNNING DETAILS, AND A TRENDY LOOK.

Models are wearing size 32 and 34
